title: Skyline Residences
description: A 12-storey luxury residential complex featuring 96 premium apartments with modern amenities, rooftop garden, and underground parking.

title: Meridian Corporate Park
description: A state-of-the-art 5-building commercial campus spanning 3.2 lakh sq.ft., designed for enterprise-grade tenants with Grade-A infrastructure.

title: The Ashford Villas
description: Eighteen standalone luxury villas nestled in the Sahyadri hills, blending modern architecture with the natural landscape.

title: Greenfield Industrial Hub
description: A purpose-built industrial facility covering 8 acres with specialized warehousing, ETP plant, and 24/7 utility infrastructure.

title: Prestige Gateway Mall
description: A 4-level retail and entertainment destination with 200+ retail units, food court, multiplex, and 1,200-vehicle parking.

title: Oakwood Township
description: An integrated township spread over 22 acres comprising 580 residential units, club house, schools, and retail outlets.
